meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve tutorial hell (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome tutorial hell. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Stop building tutorials and start building revenue. Use this intermediate checklist to implement high-converting onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell is a symptom of poor product-led growth. To escape, implement a 'Time-to-Value' (TTV) onboarding flow. By automating your setup with Antigravity and Claude Code, you condense complex configuration into a single, high-conversion action, ensuring users experience your core value proposition within their first sixty seconds.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks architecting the perfect AI agent, but your metrics tell a brutal story: users sign up, stare at a blank dashboard, and vanish into the abyss. You are trapped in 'tutorial hell,' where your product is a museum piece rather than a revenue engine. The bottleneck isn't your code; it's the friction between curiosity and utility.

Great founders don't just build features; they build pathways to success. By leveraging modern orchestration tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can automate the complex heavy lifting of user initialization. It is time to stop explaining your product and start proving its value instantly. Let’s turn that drop-off rate into a flywheel.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the single feature that provides immediate value. Strip away all unnecessary setup steps to get the user to this point in under 60 seconds.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current user flow and identify the friction points preventing users from reaching the primary value proposition within 60 seconds.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Analyze user onboarding flow for friction points and propose a streamlined path to first value.'

steps.title: Automate Environment Provisioning
steps.description: Use Antigravity to programmatically provision user-specific workspaces, ensuring the user enters a 'ready-to-go' state rather than a blank slate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a provisioning script that initializes a user workspace with pre-configured API keys and sample data based on their specific industry profile.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate a script to initialize user workspace environments using the Antigravity API.'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Context Loading
steps.description: Use Claude Code to inject relevant context into your AI agents automatically, removing the need for users to manually configure prompts or settings.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Develop an automated context-injection module that maps user onboarding quiz answers to specific AI system-prompt variables.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Integrate context-injection logic into the onboarding flow using current user profile data.'

steps.title: Build a Progressive Disclosure UI
steps.description: Don't overwhelm users. Show only what is necessary for the first task, then reveal advanced features only after the user has successfully completed the first milestone.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a UI logic structure for progressive feature disclosure, gated by the successful execution of the first AI task.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Refactor the dashboard navigation to implement progressive feature disclosure based on user milestone completion.'

steps.title: Quantify Success with Event Tracking
steps.description: Implement telemetry to monitor where users drop off, allowing you to iterate on your onboarding flow with data-driven precision.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a telemetry tracking schema to capture user progress through the onboarding flow and identify specific drop-off points.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Add event tracking to the onboarding flow to measure conversion rates for each step.'

pro_tips: Never ask a user for more than one piece of information at a time during onboarding.
Use 'Magic Links' instead of traditional passwords to reduce sign-up friction by 40%.
Pre-populate the user's dashboard with a 'demo' project that they can delete later; empty states kill conversion.
Optimize your onboarding for mobile-first, even if your tool is desktop-heavy, to capture users on the go.
Add a 'skip' button to the onboarding flow for power users who hate being walked through the basics.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding is live, conduct five user interviews to watch them interact with the flow in real-time, then use those insights to prune the lowest-performing step.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to stop the churn and start scaling. Don't let another user slip through the cracks due to a lack of direction. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
